_comment: Claw Boutique — Lambda Dispatcher Test Event
Paste this JSON into the Lambda console Test tab:
AWS Console → Lambda → ClawBoutiqueDispatcher → Test → Create new test event
This simulates a customer sending an order request via WhatsApp.
The event structure mirrors what AWS End User Messaging Social (EUM Social)
publishes to SNS when a WhatsApp message arrives on your registered number.
EUM Social serialises the WhatsApp payload to JSON, then stores that string
inside the outer SNS message JSON as the 'whatsAppWebhookEntry' field.
The Lambda dispatcher must JSON.parse() twice:
To test other scenarios, see the examples at the bottom of this file.

Sns.Subject: WhatsAppWebhookEvent
Sns.Message: {"whatsAppWebhookEntry":"{\"object\":\"whatsapp_business_account\",\"entry\":[{\"id\":\"WBA_CLAWBOUTIQUE_001\",\"changes\":[{\"field\":\"messages\",\"value\":{\"messaging_product\":\"whatsapp\",\"metadata\":{\"display_phone_number\":\"+15550001234\",\"phone_number_id\":\"PN_CLAWBOUTIQUE_001\"},\"contacts\":[{\"profile\":{\"name\":\"Alice Nguyen\"},\"wa_id\":\"12125550101\"}],\"messages\":[{\"id\":\"wamid.CLAWDEMO001==\",\"from\":\"12125550101\",\"timestamp\":\"1742724000\",\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":{\"body\":\"Hi! I'd like to order the Oxford Shirt in size M. Is it available?\"}}]}}]}]}"}

_decoded_for_reference._note: This block shows what the dispatcher sees after both JSON.parse() calls. It is NOT part of the Lambda event — it is here for readability only.

text.body: Hi! I'd like to order the Oxford Shirt in size M. Is it available?

_additional_test_scenarios._note: Copy one of these Records arrays to replace the main Records array above when testing different flows.

scenario_seller_query._description: Seller sends 'What orders today?' from their personal WhatsApp

scenario_delivery_receipt._description: Delivery status update — WhatsApp confirming a message was read by the customer

scenario_inbound_email._description: SES inbound email receipt — customer emailed support@clawboutique.com

Sns.Subject: Amazon SES Email Receipt Notification
Sns.Message:
{"notificationType":"Received","mail":{"source":"alice@example.com","destination":["support@clawboutique.com"],"messageId":"ses-demo-msg-0001","commonHeaders":{"from":["Alice Nguyen <alice@example.com>"],"to":["support@clawboutique.com"],"subject":"Question about my order","date":"Sun, 23 Mar 2026 10:10:00 +0000"},"headers":[]},"receipt":{"action":{"type":"SNS","topicArn":"arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:ClawBoutiqueInbound"}},"content":"From: Alice Nguyen <alice@example.com>
To: support@clawboutique.com
Subject: Question about my order

Hi, I placed an order yesterday and wanted to check on the shipping status. My order number is #42. Thanks!"}

scenario_image_message._description: Customer sends a photo of a product they want to order

Sns.Subject: WhatsAppWebhookEvent
Sns.Message: {"whatsAppWebhookEntry":"{\"object\":\"whatsapp_business_account\",\"entry\":[{\"id\":\"WBA_CLAWBOUTIQUE_001\",\"changes\":[{\"field\":\"messages\",\"value\":{\"messaging_product\":\"whatsapp\",\"metadata\":{\"display_phone_number\":\"+15550001234\",\"phone_number_id\":\"PN_CLAWBOUTIQUE_001\"},\"contacts\":[{\"profile\":{\"name\":\"Bob Martinez\"},\"wa_id\":\"12125550102\"}],\"messages\":[{\"id\":\"wamid.IMGDEMO001==\",\"from\":\"12125550102\",\"timestamp\":\"1742724600\",\"type\":\"image\",\"image\":{\"id\":\"img-media-id-001\",\"mime_type\":\"image/jpeg\",\"sha256\":\"abc123def456\",\"caption\":\"Do you have this dress in burgundy size S?\"}}]}}]}]}"}
